title: 助言する権利をあげる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've been observing you, and based on what I've
seen, your advice is not only sound, but also
highly effective.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As such, I shall honor you with the special
privilege of giving me advice. You have one
minute to tell me something useful.
choice_data_list: But I'm in the middle of training too...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's not often you get the opportunity to
exchange words with someone as illustrious as
me, you know!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It would be rather foolish of you not to take
advantage of such a chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's not going to let me go unless I
give her some kind of advice, so I try to think of
something to say.
choice_data_list:
What do you think of the saying "Where there's
a will, there's a way"?
Any thoughts on timing your strategy in a race?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What an intriguing question. I must say, it
makes for a fine discussion point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo and I discuss the topic for a
while.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I appreciate your subject of choice. Timing is
critical when making a final spurt in the
homestretch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And it's that very skill that serves as my ultimate
weapon! Allow me to tell you all about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo and I discuss the topic for a
while.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Goodness, look at the time! I must be going now.
